question: Will the Oklahoma City Thunder win the 2026 NBA Championship?
textDescription:
As of market creation (2026-05-16), the Oklahoma City Thunder are the #1 seed in the Western Conference and are 8-0 in the 2026 NBA Playoffs after sweeping the Lakers in the West Semifinals. They are currently playing the San Antonio Spurs (or Timberwolves, pending East Conference Final completion) in the West Final, Games scheduled May 18 / 20 / 22. The NBA Finals begin June 3 and end by June 19 (Game 7 if needed).

Resolution

Resolves YES if the Oklahoma City Thunder are awarded the Larry O'Brien Trophy at the end of the 2026 NBA Finals.

Resolves NO if any other team wins, or OKC is eliminated before the Finals.

Resolves N/A if the 2026 Finals are not completed by 2026-07-15 for any reason.

Source: nba.com playoff bracket and Finals official result.
